alert: Database load climbed after a web config rollout and cache hit rate fell.
root_cause: web server cache usage disabled by configuration regression

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:cache: Cache metrics show almost no traffic after the rollout.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:database: Database metrics show increased read load from cache bypass.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:web_server:USE_CACHE: Web USE_CACHE is false after the config rollout.

logs: WARN cache client disabled by config USE_CACHE=false

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(web server cache usage disabled by configuration regression, enable web cache)
distractors: Increasing database capacity treats the symptom rather than the web config regression.
